vineyards.name: Weingut Joh. Jos. Prum
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings by prior appointment only; contact the estate office by email to arrange a visit.
vineyards.description: The most famous Riesling estate in Wehlen, known worldwide for long-lived, reductive, off-dry wines from the Wehlener Sonnenuhr. Family-run and dedicated entirely to Riesling on blue Devonian slate.

vineyards.name: Weingut Dr. Loosen
vineyards.tasting_program: Wine tastings and cellar-door sales Monday to Saturday 10:00 to 17:00 by appointment at St. Johannishof.
vineyards.description: Ernst Loosen's estate holds parcels of ungrafted old vines in many of the Mittelmosel's grand crus, from Wehlener Sonnenuhr to Erdener Pralat and the Bernkasteler Lay. A leading global ambassador for Mosel Riesling.

vineyards.name: Weingut Fritz Haag
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings and sales by appointment at the Dusemonder Hof estate in Brauneberg.
vineyards.description: A benchmark estate on the south-facing Brauneberger Juffer and Juffer-Sonnenuhr, run by Oliver Haag. Crystalline, racy Rieslings with documented roots back to 1605.

vineyards.name: Weingut Willi Schaefer
vineyards.address: Hauptstrasse 130, 54470 Graach an der Mosel, Germany
vineyards.tasting_program: Small family estate with no fixed opening hours; visits and tastings by appointment, typically April to July.
vineyards.description: A tiny, revered grower in Graach producing precise, mineral Rieslings from the Domprobst and Himmelreich sites. Hand-worked steep slate, classic fruity Pradikat styles.

vineyards.name: Weingut Selbach-Oster
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings at the Selbach Vinothek, Gansfelder Strasse 20; Saturday 11:00 to 17:00 and Sundays and holidays by appointment.
vineyards.description: A long-established family estate working steep parcels in Zeltingen, Wehlen, Graach and Bernkastel. Known for old-vine, hand-harvested Rieslings and characterful dry and off-dry bottlings.

vineyards.name: Weingut Markus Molitor
vineyards.tasting_program: Vinothek open Monday to Friday 10:00 to 17:00, weekends and holidays by appointment.
vineyards.description: An ambitious estate spanning the Mosel and Saar with one of the largest collections of top sites in the region, plus serious Mosel Pinot Noir. Famous for its star-coded labelling of dry, off-dry and sweet styles.

vineyards.name: Weingut Egon Muller - Scharzhof
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits by appointment only; the estate sells primarily through auction and allocation.
vineyards.description: The most prestigious estate of the Saar, owner of the heart of the Scharzhofberg. Its Trockenbeerenauslese and Auslese rank among the most expensive and ageworthy white wines in the world.

vineyards.name: Weingut Van Volxem
vineyards.tasting_program: Vinothek and wine sales open Tuesday to Sunday 11:00 to 18:00.
vineyards.description: A modern Saar powerhouse revived by Roman Niewodniczanski, reclaiming historic grand-cru sites and championing dry, full-bodied, old-vine Riesling from a striking new winery above Wiltingen.

vineyards.name: Weingut Forstmeister Geltz-Zilliken
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings and sales by appointment; the estate is known for its deep, cold Saarburg cellar.
vineyards.description: A historic Saar estate centred on the Saarburger Rausch and Ockfener Bockstein, producing piercingly mineral, age-worthy Rieslings matured in a famously deep slate cellar.

vineyards.name: Weingut Peter Lauer
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings at the estate and at the attached Weinhotel Ayler Kupp restaurant; by arrangement.
vineyards.description: A fifth-generation Ayl estate famous for its barrel-fermented, dry-tasting Fass-numbered Rieslings from the Ayler Kupp. Vegan production and a cult following for its precise, gastronomic Saar style.

vineyards.name: Weingut von Hovel
vineyards.tasting_program: Office open Monday to Friday mornings; tastings by arrangement at the Oberemmel estate.
vineyards.description: A Saar estate at Oberemmel with sole ownership of the Oberemmeler Hutte monopole and parcels in the Scharzhofberg. Maximilian von Kunow makes classically styled, transparent Saar Riesling.

vineyards.name: Hofgut Falkenstein
vineyards.tasting_program: Small estate; tastings and sales by appointment at the Falkensteinerhof.
vineyards.description: A cult Saar grower making spontaneously fermented, barrel-aged Rieslings labelled in an old-fashioned cask-numbered style. Dry-leaning, transparent wines from sites around Niedermennig and Krettnach.

vineyards.name: Weingut Maximin Grunhaus
vineyards.tasting_program: Open Monday to Friday 08:00 to 17:00; Saturdays 10:00 to 16:00 from May to October, and by appointment.
vineyards.description: A monastic-rooted Ruwer estate whose three monopole vineyards, Abtsberg, Herrenberg and Brudersberg, surround the manor. Filigree, long-lived Rieslings with documented winegrowing back to the 10th century.

vineyards.name: Weingut Karthauserhof
vineyards.tasting_program: Open Monday to Friday 08:30 to 17:00; Saturdays April to October 10:00 to 15:00, and by appointment.
vineyards.description: A historic Ruwer estate founded by Carthusian monks in 1335, owner of the Eitelsbacher Karthauserhofberg monopole. Distinctive neck-only labels and racy, mineral Riesling.

vineyards.name: Weingut Reichsgraf von Kesselstatt
vineyards.owner: Reh family (managing director Dr. Karsten Weyand)
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings at Schloss Marienlay; office hours Monday to Thursday to 16:45, Friday to 13:00.
vineyards.description: A large historic estate with holdings across the Mosel, Saar and Ruwer, based at the listed Schloss Marienlay above the Ruwer. Riesling from grand crus including Scharzhofberg, Josephshofer and Kaseler Nies'chen.

vineyards.name: Weingut Heymann-Lowenstein
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings and sales at the Winningen estate by appointment.
vineyards.description: A pioneer of dry, terroir-driven Lower Mosel Riesling from the terraced Winninger Uhlen and Rottgen sites. Powerful, parcel-specific, spontaneously fermented wines on the Terrassenmosel.

vineyards.name: Weingut Knebel
vineyards.tasting_program: Open Monday to Saturday by prior telephone appointment at the Winningen estate.
vineyards.description: A leading Terrassenmosel grower with prime parcels in the Winninger Rottgen, Uhlen and Hamm. Matthias Knebel makes precise, mineral, mostly dry Riesling from the terraced Lower Mosel.

vineyards.name: Weingut Clemens Busch
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings and sales by appointment at the Punderich estate.
vineyards.description: A biodynamic pioneer in Punderich working the single Marienburg slope as separate blue, red and grey-slate parcels. Organic since 1984 and certified biodynamic since 2015; characterful, often skin-influenced dry Riesling.

vineyards.name: Weingut Reinhold Haart
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings by appointment at the riverside estate in Piesport.
vineyards.description: The leading estate of Piesport, with the lion's share of the perfumed Goldtropfchen. Family vineyard ownership documented since 1337; aromatic, peach-and-citrus Riesling of great finesse.

vineyards.name: Weingut Schloss Lieser
vineyards.tasting_program: Vinothek tastings and sales at the estate in Lieser; visits by arrangement.
vineyards.description: Thomas Haag's estate at the castle village of Lieser, with parcels in the Brauneberger Juffer, Wehlener Sonnenuhr and Niederberg Helden. Multiple-time German winery of the year for its precise Rieslings.

verified.address_quoted: Weingut Schloss Lieser, Am Markt 1-5, D-54470 Lieser

vineyards.name: Weingut Immich-Batterieberg
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings and sales by appointment at the estate in Enkirch.
vineyards.description: One of the oldest estates on the Mosel, revived by Gernot Kollmann around the old-vine Enkircher sites of Batterieberg, Steffensberg and Ellergrub. Dry, spontaneously fermented, low-intervention Riesling.

vineyards.name: Weingut Vollenweider
vineyards.owner: Moritz Hoffmann (estate founded by Daniel Vollenweider)
vineyards.tasting_program: Small estate; tastings and sales by appointment in Traben-Trarbach.
vineyards.description: A boutique estate founded by Swiss-born Daniel Vollenweider and centred on the steep old-vine Wolfer Goldgrube, now led by Moritz Hoffmann. Concentrated, classically fruity Mosel Riesling from the Traben-Trarbach area.

vineyards.name: Weingut Weiser-Kunstler
vineyards.tasting_program: Small estate; tastings and sales by appointment in Traben-Trarbach.
vineyards.description: A sought-after small grower working steep, organically farmed parcels in the Enkircher Ellergrub and Trabener Gaispfad. Detailed, low-intervention Riesling in dry and fruity styles.

vineyards.name: Weingut Joh. Jos. Christoffel Erben
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings at the Monchhof Vinothek, where both estates' wines can be tasted and bought.
vineyards.description: A storied Urzig label held by the Christoffel family for four centuries and now made and distributed by Robert Eymael of Monchhof. Classic, delicately sweet Riesling from the Urziger Wurzgarten and Erdener Treppchen.

vineyards.name: Weingut Monchhof - Robert Eymael
vineyards.tasting_program: Vinothek tastings of both Monchhof and Joh. Jos. Christoffel Erben wines; visits by arrangement.
vineyards.description: One of the oldest estates in the Mosel, with records back to the Cistercian abbey of Himmerod in 1177. Robert Eymael makes traditional fruity Riesling from the Urziger Wurzgarten and Erdener sites.

vineyards.name: Weingut Dr. Hermann
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings and sales by appointment at the riverside estate in Erden.
vineyards.description: An Erden family estate with prime holdings in the steep Erdener Pralat and Treppchen and the Urziger Wurzgarten. Classic fruity-style Mosel Riesling across the Pradikat ladder.

vineyards.name: Weingut S.A. Prum
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings and sales at the listed villa estate in Wehlen; visits by arrangement.
vineyards.description: A Wehlen estate housed in a 1920s reform-style villa, with parcels in the Wehlener Sonnenuhr and Graacher Himmelreich. Now led by Saskia Prum, producing classic and dry Mosel Riesling.

vineyards.name: Weingut Studert-Prum
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings and sales by arrangement at the Maximinhof estate in Wehlen.
vineyards.description: A long-established Wehlen family estate, the Maximinhof, with parcels in the Wehlener Sonnenuhr and Graacher sites. Traditional Mosel Riesling and a riverside cellar door.

vineyards.name: Weingut Kerpen
vineyards.tasting_program: Vinothek and Riesling cafe in the garden; tastings and sales at the Wehlen estate.
vineyards.description: A nine-generation family estate in Wehlen with parcels in the Wehlener Sonnenuhr, Graacher Domprobst and Bernkasteler sites. Riesling-focused, with a small amount of Spatburgunder.

vineyards.name: Weingut Dr. Pauly-Bergweiler
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings and sales at the Bernkastel-Kues estate; visits by arrangement.
vineyards.description: A Bernkastel estate with holdings in the Bernkasteler alte Badstube am Doctorberg, Wehlener Sonnenuhr and Urziger Wurzgarten, plus the linked Peter Nicolay label. Classic fruity-style Mosel Riesling.

vineyards.name: Weingut Wwe. Dr. H. Thanisch - Erben Muller-Burggraef
vineyards.tasting_program: Open Monday to Friday 10:00 to 17:00 and Saturday 11:00 to 16:00, or by appointment, in Andel.
vineyards.description: One of two Thanisch estates with historic parcels in the Bernkasteler Doctor, based in the Andel district of Bernkastel-Kues. Over 375 years of family winegrowing and classic Mosel Riesling.

vineyards.name: Weingut Max Ferd. Richter
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings and sales at the Mulheim estate; visits by arrangement.
vineyards.description: A ninth-generation estate at Mulheim with parcels across the Mittelmosel including the Brauneberger Juffer and a Mulheimer Helenenkloster site noted for Eiswein. Wide range of fruity and dry Riesling.

vineyards.name: Weingut Heinrichshof
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings and sales at the Zeltingen-Rachtig estate; visits by arrangement.
vineyards.description: A family estate in Zeltingen-Rachtig with parcels in the Zeltinger Sonnenuhr and Himmelreich. Approachable, fruit-driven Mosel Riesling and everyday whites.

vineyards.name: Weingut Nik Weis - St. Urbans-Hof
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings and sales at the Leiwen estate; visits by appointment.
vineyards.description: A leading Leiwen estate with sites on both the Mosel and Saar, including the Leiwener Laurentiuslay, Ockfener Bockstein and Wiltinger Schlangengraben. Pure, classically styled Riesling for a global market.

vineyards.name: Weingut Grans-Fassian
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings and sales at the Leiwen estate; visits by arrangement.
vineyards.description: A Leiwen estate with parcels in the Leiwener Laurentiuslay, Trittenheimer Apotheke and Piesporter Goldtropfchen. Precise dry and fruity Riesling plus a little Weissburgunder.

vineyards.name: Weingut Carl Loewen
vineyards.owner: Loewen family (Karl Josef and Christopher Loewen)
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings and sales at the Leiwen estate; visits by arrangement.
vineyards.description: A Leiwen estate celebrated for the ungrafted old-vine Maximin Herrenberg and the Laurentiuslay. Christopher Loewen makes detailed dry and fruity Rieslings, including the 1896 Riesling from pre-phylloxera vines.

vineyards.name: Weingut A.J. Adam
vineyards.tasting_program: Small estate; tastings and sales by appointment in Neumagen-Dhron.
vineyards.description: A small, sought-after grower who revived the steep Dhroner Hofberg. Andreas Adam makes concentrated dry and fruity Rieslings that have become collector favourites.

vineyards.name: Weingut Loersch
vineyards.tasting_program: Small estate; tastings and sales by appointment in Leiwen.
vineyards.description: A young, ambitious Leiwen grower working old-vine parcels in the Trittenheimer Apotheke and Leiwener Laurentiuslay. Precise, mostly dry Rieslings from steep slate.

vineyards.name: Weingut Stein
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings at Haus Waldfrieden above Alf and at the Bullay estate; by arrangement.
vineyards.description: Ulli Stein's individualist estate around St. Aldegund and Alf, known for low-intervention, sometimes provocative Rieslings from steep, near-abandoned slate sites and a hilltop tasting house.

vineyards.name: Weingut Daniel Twardowski
vineyards.tasting_program: Very small estate; visits and tastings strictly by appointment.
vineyards.description: A cult micro-estate proving the slate Mosel can make serious Pinot Noir. Daniel Twardowski's Pinot Noix is grown on Devonian slate and made in a Burgundian, low-yield style.

vineyards.name: Weingut Vereinigte Hospitien
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings and sales in central Trier; visits to the historic Roman cellar by arrangement.
vineyards.description: A charitable-foundation estate in Trier sitting atop Roman-era cellars, with parcels in the Scharzhofberg, Serriger and Trier sites. Classic Mosel and Saar Riesling supporting the hospital foundation.

vineyards.name: Bischofliche Weinguter Trier
vineyards.tasting_program: Wine shop open Monday to Saturday; guided tastings and tours of the vast historic cellar by booking.
vineyards.description: A large church-owned estate formed in 1966 from historic Trier ecclesiastical wineries, with holdings across the Mosel, Saar and Ruwer and a monumental cellar dating to late antiquity. Broad range of Riesling.
